title: SweechBar notarization and DMG distribution
description: Notarize SweechBar.app for macOS Gatekeeper and create DMG installer.

context.text: Build script scripts/build-dmg.sh: release build, code signing, DMG creation, notarization. Entitlements file added. Requires DEVELOPER_ID and APPLE_ID env vars for signing/notarization.

acceptanceCriteria: App is signed with developer certificate
